title: Hydra DPB-100 Diesel Power Blast - Diesel Fuel System Cleaner | Diesel Injector Cleaner with Diesel Fuel Additive | 1 Litre Treats 1,000L
features: Inexpensive Quality Product: Hydra DBP-100 is a diesel additive that helps in Diesel cleaning. This fuel injector cleaner turns the cheapest fuel into premium fuel, but at a much better cost than buying at a filling station. Perfect for cold starting, smoother engine with better pick-up with reduced diesel knock, smoke and harmful emissions.

Extensive use: DBP-100 DIESEL FUEL INJECTOR CLEANER is for diesel engines. It is a diesel cleaner and fuel stabiliser, that contains cetane booster, and lubricants. It also contains detergents that clean fuel lines, pumps, injectors, fantastic turbo diesel cleaner, EGR valves, helps keep DPF clean

Exceptional Performance: Hydra DBP-100 is a high performance cleaning diesel Injector additive. Hydra uses polyetheramine, which creates the best diesel injector cleaner; that removes existing carbon deposits and prevents new formation. It helps restore engine performance and power to as new.

Perfect Lubricant: The dpf cleaner diesel and regenerator helps in decreased fuel pump, injector and cylinder wear issues. It is low in sulphur and works at low temperatures. The diesel injector cleaner also helps to improve fuel economy. Giving an HFRR wear profile of less than 300.

Customer Satisfaction: Hydra DBP-100 ensure 100% customer satisfaction for all their products. In case of any query related to the diesel injector cleaner, feel free to contact us. We will try providing a solution to our best capacity.
description: Product Description Hydra DPB-100 Diesel Power Blast DIESEL TURBO CLEANER CLEANS ALL ENGINE COMPONENTS This diesel fuel injector cleaner, fuel improver contains a cetane booster, lubricants, detergents, and stabilisers that clean fuel lines, pumps, injectors, EGR valves, fantastic turbo diesel cleaner, which helps keep DPF clean. Modern diesel engines within 20-30 hours running, can lose as much as 5% of their power and fuel efficiency through deposits building up inside the injectors. These deposits affect the smooth flow of injected diesel fuel reducing fuel economy. DOSING RATES 1st Application Dose Rate: 1:1,000 Use 1ml Hydra DPB-100 to 1 litres of fuel. Maintenance Dose Rate: 1:1,500 Use 2ml Hydra DPB-100 to 3 litres of fuel. Important Features Contains cetane booster, lubricants, and detergents Reduces diesel smoke, odour, and all harmful emissions Cleans injectors, fuel pump EGR valves, turbos etc Prevents formation of, and removes existing deposits caused by carbon 500ml Treats up to 750L of diesel fuel DIESEL FUEL ADDITIVE CONTAINS POWERFUL DETERGENTS. HYDRA DPB-100 diesel fuel additive is a specialized fuel injector cleaner, carbon deposit remover, fuel lubricant, and cetane booster. Carbon and unburnt fuel deposits are rapidly removed from all internal engine components. Using polyetheramine which is the latest diesel cleaning technology. Ensures a complete internal engine clean, down to molecular levels. IMPROVES FUEL ECONOMY Contains a cetane booster ingredient, speeds up the ignition point of diesel fuel, gives longer burn time, releases more energy, and increasing fuel efficiency. Giving the engine an as-new performance. STABILISES DIESEL FUEL The problem with diesel fuel used in boats, generators, farm vehicles, etc, is that fuel can remain in the fuel tank for extended periods before being used. This fuel starts to degrade after only 4 weeks, leading to long-term problems and inefficiencies. Hydra’s active ingredients ensure that your fuel remains sweet and stable for much longer. Stabilizes diesel up to 2 years, ideal for winter storage. INCREASED LUBRICITY Decreased fuel pump and injector wear issues, working in very cold climates, test results give an HFRR Wear Profile of less than 300. These lubricants help maintain diesel engine performance by reducing friction in cylinders and fuel injectors whilst improving the lubricity of diesel fuel which in turn helps improve fuel economy. Use regularly when you fill-up.
